query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale_attivi,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email LIKE '%@test%' OR email LIKE '%@example%' OR email LIKE '%@fake%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_emails,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email NOT LIKE '%@%.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as formato_invalido,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(email) < 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as troppo_corti,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 365 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as iscritti_oltre_1anno
FROM subscribers
WHERE status = 'active';
